name: Forced Fulfilment
additional_info: The Metal Fakeout critical only works while you are in range of a target. Additionally, this critical applies Bleed and counts as a weapon attack, not a Mantra. The rod applies a 52.5% slow for 15 seconds.
desc: Your Metal Greatsword now has Metal Fakeout as its critical attack. Landing a critical attack using your Metal Greatsword attaches a heavy rod onto your opponent, heavily slowing them.
